private.label: Private: hidden from AI
private.tooltip: AI can't see this terminal's output. Use it for secrets, SSH, or anything you don't want sent to the model.

sshConnection.title: Connect SSH workspace
sshConnection.profileMissing: This SSH profile is no longer available.
sshConnection.rememberSecret: Store securely in the system keychain
sshConnection.rememberProxySecret: Store proxy password securely in the system keychain
sshConnection.agent: Authentication will use your SSH agent.
sshConnection.homeError: SSH connected, but the remote workspace home could not be resolved.

transfers.label: Transfers
transfers.title: File transfers
transfers.partialResult_one: {{committed}} of {{total}} top-level items was saved before the task stopped.
transfers.partialResult_other: {{committed}} of {{total}} top-level items were saved before the task stopped.

errors.workspace_unavailable: File transfer is unavailable in this workspace.
errors.source_unavailable: A source file or folder is unavailable.
errors.source_changed: A source changed during the transfer. Retry after it is stable.
errors.destination_exists: An item with the same name already exists at the destination.
errors.destination_busy: Another transfer is currently writing to this destination.
errors.archive_unavailable: Archive transfer is unavailable. Use Direct transfer instead.
errors.integrity_check_failed: The transferred data failed its integrity check.
errors.permission_denied: Permission was denied while accessing a transfer path.
errors.storage_full: The destination does not have enough free space.
errors.resource_limit: The transfer task exceeds a safety limit.
errors.task_not_found: This transfer task is no longer available.
errors.invalid_task_state: This action is unavailable for the current task state.
errors.internal: The transfer stopped because of an internal error.

tunnels.label: Tunnels
tunnels.managedByPrimary: Tunnels are managed by the primary SSH workspace window.
tunnels.title: SSH tunnels
tunnels.description: Saved tunnels for {{name}}. Enabled tunnels start after SSH connects.
tunnels.empty: No saved tunnels for this SSH workspace.
tunnels.name: Name
tunnels.namePlaceholder: Leave empty to generate a name
tunnels.enabledHint: Enabled tunnels start automatically after SSH connects.

validation.bindPort: Bind port must be from 0 to 65535.
validation.targetHost: Target host is required and cannot contain whitespace.
validation.targetPort: Target port must be from 1 to 65535.
